response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a seasoned full-stack engineer with a strong TypeScript/Node.js and DLang background, but falls critically short of the mandatory requirements for this role. His C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments and a bachelor thesis project, far below the 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development required. His SQL experience covers MySQL with no evidence of SQL Server or Oracle proficiency. While he has brief fintech exposure at RIDE Capital, it was entirely in TypeScript/Node.js with no capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking systems work. The role's core mandatory skills are essentially absent.
strengths: Demonstrated software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) applicable to any engineering environment
Brief fintech exposure at RIDE Capital providing some financial-services domain awareness
CI/CD pipeline and DevOps experience (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory) aligns with desirable skills
concerns: C++ experience is approximately 6 months versus the 5–10 years mandated; primary stack is TypeScript and DLang
No demonstrable SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL skills are MySQL-level and peripheral to core work
Zero fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking systems background in any language
